positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of 'The Great Outdoors' merging with celestial elements. The main subject is a stylized silhouette of towering pine trees and winding mountain peaks set against a dramatic, luminous crescent moon and scattered constellations. Utilize negative space effectively, creating clean lines and strong contrast. The color palette should be deep indigo, forest green, muted gold, and cream. The style should be neo-art deco vector illustration with an ethereal watercolor wash overlay, ensuring the design is highly scalable and repeatable for apparel print. Central composition, symmetrical or balanced asymmetry. High detail, perfect symmetry, vibrant.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low detail, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, messy, dirty, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, complex background, graffiti
